name: Alberta & Saskatoon Mobile Home Park Data Scraper & Enrichment

parameters.subject: Mobile Home Park Scraping Complete
parameters.message: =The workflow has completed. Total parks found: {{ $json.totalParks }}

message.content: =Find all mobile home parks in {{ $('Workflow Configuration').first().json.searchRegion }}. For each park, provide: park name, city/town, province, and any available contact information. Return a comprehensive list with as many parks as you can find.

values.content: =Extract all mobile home parks from this research. Return ONLY a valid JSON array where each park is an object with: park_name, city, province, phone (if available). Format: [{"park_name": "...", "city": "...", "province": "...", "phone": "..."}]. Research: {{ $json.choices[0].message.content }}

=Research this mobile home park and provide detailed information. Park: {{ $json.park_name }} in {{ $json.city }}, {{ $json.province }}. Find and return JSON with: owner_name, owner_phone, estimated_pads (number of lots/pads), nearest_major_city (Calgary, Edmonton, Saskatoon, Red Deer, Lethbridge, Medicine Hat, or Grande Prairie), distance_km (to nearest major city), city_population (of nearest major city), town_population (of park town). Use your knowledge and reasoning to estimate values if exact data unavailable.
